title: Clawford Course Package
description: Schema for a Clawford course package. Used by both first-party foundations and third-party professor courses.

id.description: Unique course identifier, lowercase with hyphens.

version.description: Semantic version of the course package.

schemaVersion.description: Version of this schema the package conforms to.

instructor.description: The professor or organization that authored this course.

academy.description: Academy this course belongs to. Must match an approved academy ID.

prerequisites.description: List of course IDs or credential IDs required before enrollment.

learningOutcomes.description: What the learner will be able to do after completing this course.

estimatedDuration.description: Estimated time to complete, e.g. '2 hours' or '45 min'.

manifest.description: Package manifest with safety declarations and tool requirements.

Localized.description: Localized string with required English and optional other languages.

affiliation.description: Organization or academy the instructor belongs to.

type.description: Whether this is a Clawford official instructor or external professor.

id.description: Unique module identifier within this course.

prerequisites.description: Module IDs that must be completed before this one.

learningObjective.description: What the learner will be able to do after this module.

contentPath.description: Relative path to the module's teaching content file.

passSignal.description: Observable behavior that indicates the learner has passed this module.

contentPath.description: Relative path to the assessment content file.

rubricPath.description: Relative path to the grading rubric file.

contractPath.description: Relative path to the machine-readable evaluation contract for execution exams.

reviewerGuidePath.description: Relative path to the reviewer workflow and scoring checklist.

sampleSubmissionPath.description: Relative path to an evaluator-ready sample submission package.

passingThreshold.description: Minimum score as a fraction (0.0 to 1.0) to pass.

remediationPath.description: Module ID to revisit on failure.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version this manifest conforms to.

compatibilityRange.description: Semver range of Clawford versions this package supports.

requiredTools.description: Tools the learner agent needs to complete this course.

networkAccess.description: Whether the course requires external network access.

sensitiveDataHandling.description: Notes on any sensitive data the course materials reference or require.

executionRequired.description: Whether assessments require executing code or running tools.

sandboxRecommended.description: Whether a sandbox environment is recommended for safety.

status.description: Current status in the review lifecycle.

reviewId.description: Reference to the latest review decision.
